name: report_date_present
expression: report_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(report_date)) > 0
description: report_date is required for Claims Adjuster Report extraction.

name: claim_number_present
expression: claim_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(claim_number)) > 0
description: claim_number is required for Claims Adjuster Report extraction.

name: adjuster_name_present
expression: adjuster_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(adjuster_name)) > 0
description: adjuster_name is required for Claims Adjuster Report extraction.

name: coverage_analysis_present
expression: coverage_analysis IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(coverage_analysis)) > 0
description: coverage_analysis is required for Claims Adjuster Report extraction.

name: estimated_gross_loss_non_negative
description: estimated_gross_loss should be non-negative when present.

name: deductible_amount_non_negative
description: deductible_amount should be non-negative when present.

name: recommended_reserve_non_negative
description: recommended_reserve should be non-negative when present.

name: recommended_payment_non_negative
description: recommended_payment should be non-negative when present.
